---
title: "Holly Morehouse"
format:
  html:
    theme: cyborg
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

# Hello There!

Welcome to my website! I’m a training & development coach within the personal lines insurance industry.  
Explore my work, background, and ways to connect below.

---

## 🌟 What You’ll Find Here

- <a href="about.html">**About**</a> – Learn more about my background and experience  
- <a href="projects.html">**Projects**</a> – Explore my work and case studies  
- <a href="cv.html">**CV**</a> – View my professional history  
- <a href="contact.html">**Contact**</a> – Get in touch  

---
